title: Alignment
pickOne: **Good** - Give hope or cheer to someone who needs it.
**Neutral** - Accomplish something great in spite of yourself.
**Chaotic** - Evade responsibility for the consequences of your actions.

title: Race
pickOne: **Dwarf** - You hold your liquor like a pro. You can drink anyone under the table. *Anyone*.
**Human** - At the end of the session, if all of the other players mark XP from **A Very Special Episode**, you mark XP too.
**Halfling** - You have sticky fingers. When you **depart from a steading**, a small trinket "appears" in your pocket; the GM will tell you what you found.

title: Fool's Luck
description: When you **Make Camp**, set your Luck to 3. When you roll and get a 6-, you may lower your Luck by 1 to re-roll. Take the second result, and if it is a hit, explain how you succeeded only through sheer luck. When your Luck is zero, you may not lower it further.

title: I'm On An Adventure!
description: Gain a starting move from a playbook no one else is using. When you use that move, if you fail, after the GM makes their move, you can add a comical or embarrassing detail to your failure. Your move is still a miss, of course.

title: Comic Relief
description:
When you **make everyone else laugh, including the GM**, take **+1 forward**. When someone else **Aids or Interferes** with you, they take +1.

When the **rest of the group ditches you or sets you up to die**, you will meet up with them again at the next available opportunity; describe how you improbably cheated certain death to rejoin them. Alternatively, you may choose to give up this character. If you do, the Fool will return again someday… but as a villain under the GM's control, looking for revenge.

title: A Very Special Episode
description: At the end of the session, each other player may tell you something they learned from you—a positive moral for everyone to take home and reflect upon. If they do, they mark XP.

title: Curly Shuffle
description: When you **Hack and Slash** while you're all fired up, on a 10+, choose one in addition to dealing your damage:

bullets: Your foe stumbles and is knocked flat on their face
You snatch something from your foe in the confusion
You open your foe up to someone else's attack instead of dealing damage

title: Hey, What Does This Do? (+Luck)
description: When you **put yourself at risk to check something out**, ask the GM any one question related to the risks and roll+**Luck**.

outcomes.text: The GM will answer it, as clearly as the circumstances allow.
The GM will tell you what more you need to do to find the answer yourself.

title: Fool's Wisdom (+INT)
description: When you **Spout Lore**, don't roll. Instead, just blurt out the first thing that comes to mind. When the truth of what you say is put to the test, roll+INT.

outcomes.text: You were right, more or less.
You messed up or forgot a key detail.

title: I Think I'm Getting The Hang Of This
description: Gain a non-multiclass move from the playbook you chose for **I'm On An Adventure!** You may not choose a move that requires level 6 or higher.

title: Look, A Distraction!
description: When you **Volley**, on a 10+ you may draw your target's attention elsewhere instead of dealing damage.

title: Oooh, Something Shiny
description: When you're **in the presence of something hidden and valuable**, you notice it right away.

title: Party Crasher (+CHA)
description: When you **brazenly stride into a place you're not supposed to be**, roll+CHA.

outcomes.text: Your entrance goes unnoticed until you draw attention to yourself.
Someone is already suspicious of you.

title: Short Attention Span (+DEX)
description: When you **take advantage of the fact that no one is paying attention to you to discreetly do something**, roll+DEX.

outcomes.text: No one will notice what you did until you're no longer around, and they won't even think to blame you unless you personally tell them you did it.
No one will notice what you did until you're no longer around.

title: Take One For The Team
description: When you **take damage that was intended for someone else**, you get +1 **Luck**. You may not spend Luck to negate this damage.

title: Was That Wrong?
description: When you **do something so incredibly stupid that everyone else can only stare at you in disbelief**, you get +1 **Luck**. You'll probably need it soon.

title: Fool's Errand (+CHA) (Requires level 6+)
description: When you **con someone into taking an unwise or imprudent course of action**, roll+CHA.

outcomes.text: They are tricked, and don't realize the error of their ways until the consequences fall on them.
They're either not fooled for long, or they'll hold a grudge against you, GM's choice.

title: Four-Leaf Clover (Requires level 6+)
description: When you **Make Camp**, set your **Luck** to 4 instead of 3. When you take damage, you may lower your **Luck** by 1 to ignore it; describe the comedic, contrived, or outright miraculous circumstances that saved you from harm.

title: I Meant To Do That (Requires level 6+)
description: When you **fail a move**, you can choose to not mark XP. If you do, choose someone who will either stare at you dumbfounded or double over in uncontrolled laughter. Describe the epic failure of yours that causes them to react that way. You have to fail; if you spend **Luck** to succeed, this move is not triggered.

title: Idiot Savant (Requires level 6+)
description: When you gain this move, pick one of the following moves. You may choose to make that move with +**Luck** instead of the usual stat from now on:

title: Mostly Harmless (Requires level 6+)
description: While you **show a friendly face and act charming**, anyone not already actively hostile to you will treat you as a friend until proven otherwise.

title: Nyuk Nyuk Nyuk (Requires level 6+)
description: You may lower your **Luck** by 1 to deal 1d10 damage to an enemy. Describe how you embarrass, humiliate, or accidentally clobber them.

title: Pop Goes the Weasel (Requires level 6+)
description:
Requires: **Curly Shuffle**

When you **Hack and Slash** while you're all fired up, deal +1d4 damage.

title: Robin Goodfellow (+CHA) (Requires level 6+)
description: When you **publicly mock someone of higher social standing than you**, roll+CHA.

outcomes.text: Your audience takes it in good humor, and you avoid reprisal... for now. You may also ask the subject of your mockery one question, which they must answer honestly and publicly.
Your audience takes it in good humor, and you avoid reprisal... for now.

title: Should I Not Have Done That? (Requires level 6+)
description:
Requires: **Was That Wrong?**

When you **draw unwanted attention or are put in a spot**, you can choose not to personally suffer the consequences. Someone or something else nearby, possibly your equipment but certainly not you, suffers the consequences instead.

title: Woo Woo Woo (Requires level 6+)
description: When you **Defy Danger** **by running around in an idiotic panic**, you roll with +**Luck** instead of whatever the GM says, and on a 12+ you turn the danger back on itself, describe the ridiculous circumstances that caused it.
